step3_event_grammar.command: python3 -c "import subprocess,re; result=subprocess.run(['grep','-rh','wicked.interactive.','src/','--include=*.js'],capture_output=True,text=True); events=set(re.findall(r'wicked\.interactive\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*',result.stdout)); bad=[e for e in events if len(e.split('.'))!=4]; print('event_count:',len(events)); print('non_conforming:',bad); assert not bad; print('PASS')"
